text: I feel a sense of anticipation as I step into this space, surrounded by clean, modern architecture and well-lit displays. The words 'R + D' immediately draw me in, signaling an environment dedicated to exploration, innovation, and thoughtful inquiry. There is a quiet excitement here—a place where ideas come to life and the boundary between humanity and technology feels palpable yet inviting. I am both an observer and a participant, moving with curiosity through this thoughtfully curated intersection of thought and creation.
